sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: The Lord gave him eternal renown, and he will inherit an everlasting name.

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. Behold my servant whom I have chosen, my beloved
* In whom my soul hath been well pleased.
V. I have placed my spirit upon him, and he shall shew judgment to the Gentiles.
R. In whom my soul hath been well pleased.

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio5:s/When .*//s

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio5:s/.* When /When /s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. With the bread of life and understanding, she shall feed him,
* And she shall exalt him among his neighbours.
V. And in the midst of the church she shall open his mouth, and shall fill him with the spirit of wisdom and understanding.
R. And she shall exalt him among his neighbours.

sections.name: Lectio9
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio7:s/The one..escheweth.*//s

sections.name: Lectio10
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio7:s/.* The one..escheweth/The one escheweth/s s/$/~/
@Sancti/12-27:Lectio8:s/The..one is.*//s

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio8:s/.* The..one is/The one is/s
@Sancti/12-27:Lectio9:s/The one laboureth.*//s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. A virgin was chosen by the Lord and was loved more than the others, who, reclining against the breast of the Lord, drank of the stream of the Gospel that flowed from the sacred fountain of the Lord's breast.
* And he poured the grace of the words of God through the whole world.
V. Through the intoxicating grace of the Holy Spirit he opened to others the higher secrets of the Godhead.
R. And he poured the grace of the words of God through the whole world.

sections.name: Lectio12
lines: @Sancti/12-27:Lectio9:s/.* The one laboureth/The one laboureth/s

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. So I will have him to remain till I come,
* What is it to thee? Follow thou me.
V. Him therefore when Peter had seen, he saith to Jesus: Lord, and what shall this man do?
R. What is it to thee?  follow thou me.
